title: Terms & Conditions
intro: Please read these Terms & Conditions ("Terms") carefully before using the CalorieKitchen mobile application ("App"). By creating an account or continuing as a guest you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the App.

blocks.text: CalorieKitchen is a personal nutrition and calorie-tracking tool operated by an individual developer ("we", "us", "our"). The App helps users log meals, track macros, set calorie goals, and monitor progress. It is not a medical product and is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition.
You must be at least 16 years old to use CalorieKitchen. By using the App you confirm that you meet this requirement. If you are under 18, you should have the consent of a parent or legal guardian.
You may use the App without creating an account ("Guest Mode"). When using Guest Mode:
All data is stored only on your device. We do not receive or store it on our servers.
If you uninstall the App or clear its data, your guest data will be permanently lost. We cannot recover it.
You can link a Google account at any time to back up your data to the cloud.

CalorieKitchen is a general-purpose tracking tool and is NOT a substitute for professional medical, dietetic, or nutritional advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional before making significant changes to your diet or exercise routine, especially if you have a medical condition or are pregnant.

Nutritional values displayed in the App are sourced from third-party databases and user-submitted data. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of any nutritional information. Use it as a guide only.
You agree to:
Provide accurate information in your profile so your calorie targets are calculated correctly.
Not use the App for any unlawful purpose or in a way that could harm others.
Keep your Google account credentials secure. You are responsible for all activity under your account.
Not reverse-engineer, decompile, or tamper with the App.

All content, design, code, and materials in the App are the property of the developer and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to use the App for your personal, non-commercial use only.

The free version of CalorieKitchen may display advertisements from third-party ad networks. Paid subscriptions remove advertisements and unlock additional features depending on the tier purchased (Bronze, Silver, or Gold). Subscription terms, including any free-trial period, are presented at the point of purchase through the Google Play Store and are subject to Google Play's billing policies.

Silver and Gold subscriptions include AI photo scanning (meal photos and fridge photos). Bronze and Gold subscriptions include AI data insights (recipe suggestions from your fridge, and a weekly progress observation). Using these features means:
A photo you take of a meal or your fridge is sent to Google's Gemini API to identify the food or ingredients shown. We do not store these photos — they are processed and then discarded.

For meal photo scanning, identified food names are also sent to the USDA FoodData Central public database (a US government nutrition database) to look up calorie and macro information. No personal data is sent to USDA — only a food name and an estimated portion size.

For AI data insights, a compact summary of your own data (e.g. recent food names, daily calorie/protein totals, dietary preference, fridge contents) — never your full diary history or raw entries — is sent to Google's Gemini API to generate suggestions or a short observation.
None of these features use free-form chat: you never type a prompt to the AI, and every response is a short, structured suggestion or observation, not a conversation.
These features are opt-in by nature — they only activate when you purchase the relevant subscription tier and actively use them (taking a photo, tapping a suggestion button).

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, we shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, the App — including but not limited to loss of data, health outcomes based on nutritional information, or loss of guest-mode data.
Our total liability to you for any claim arising out of or relating to these Terms or the App shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

The App uses third-party services including Google Sign-In, Supabase (cloud storage), Google's Gemini API, and the USDA FoodData Central public database (see section 8 for the AI features that use the latter two). Your use of these services is subject to their own terms and privacy policies. We are not responsible for the practices of these third parties.

We may update these Terms from time to time. When we do, we will update the effective date above and prompt you to review and re-accept the updated Terms within the App. Continued use after acceptance of the updated Terms constitutes agreement to the changes.

These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.
If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
caloriekitchen@gmail.com
